name: KeenKeeper
description: KinKeeper is a modern web application designed to manage and interact with friends or contacts efficiently. It provides a clean UI and essential communication features like calling, messaging, and organizing contacts.

name: DigiTools-Platform
description: It is a Premium Digital Tools e-commerce website where users can browse and buy products by clicking Buy Now button.Users can add products to the cart and also remove them from the cart.

name: Git Issue Tracker
description: A GitHub-style Issues Tracker web app that allows users to view, search, and filter issues with a clean and interactive UI.

name: English Janala
description: An English Janala app that helps users improve English skills through simple lessons and practice.
